comments.min_sample_threshold: Minimum posts per county per 72-hour window to compute score
comments.ema_alpha: Exponential moving average smoothing factor (0=no smoothing, 1=full smoothing)
comments.threshold_monitor: Score threshold to enter monitoring tier (0-1)
comments.threshold_escalate: Score threshold to escalate to human review (0-1)
comments.confidence_min: Minimum confidence level required to escalate (0-1)
comments.persistence_windows: Number of consecutive windows above escalate threshold before escalating
comments.optimal_threshold: BERT binary decision threshold (default 0.70). Set to Youden's J optimal value from validation: compute_youden_thresholds(val_scores, val_labels)
